name: Critical Bug Fixes & Environment Setup
description: Create .env.example with all Firebase, Stripe, Groq variables. Add onboardingCompleted boolean to UserPreferences in types/index.ts. Update lib/store.ts to use onboardingCompleted flag instead of !emotionalGoal for isOnboarding logic.

name: SmartRescheduler Component
description: Build components/ai/SmartRescheduler.tsx that detects overdue scheduled blocks on app load. Display bottom sheet offering AI-powered auto-reschedule using Groq. Intelligently redistribute remaining blocks considering energy patterns. Integrate into app/[locale]/page.tsx after Header.

name: SnoozeModal & ActionCard Enhancement
description: Create components/modals/SnoozeModal.tsx with quick snooze options (5min, 15min, 30min, 1h, Later). Shift selected action and all subsequent actions forward. Add encouraging non-judgmental messaging. Use Framer Motion for slide-up animation. Add snooze button to ActionCard.tsx.

name: Sound & Haptic Feedback System
description: Build components/polish/SoundSystem.tsx with useSoundSystem hook supporting playSound('complete'|'start'|'snooze'|'achievement'). Generate sounds via Web Audio API (no external files). Integrate navigator.vibrate() for mobile haptics. Add soundEnabled toggle to SettingsPage.tsx with user preferences persistence.

name: Android-Optimized Install Banner
description: Enhance components/InstallBanner.tsx with Android Chrome detection. Add messaging emphasizing all features available on Android (competitive advantage vs Structured). Improve PWA installation guidance with step-by-step Android-specific instructions.

name: Structured.app Migration Banner
description: Create components/onboarding/MigrationBanner.tsx displayed once post-onboarding. Guide users to export from Structured and import to Senseday. Trigger existing ImportModal workflow. Include incentive messaging for seamless transition.
